# Phase 8 Closure Readiness Plan

This planning note records Phase 8.13 scope for infrastructure era closure and certification-readiness review architecture. It is documentation-only and cannot create executable workflows.

## Scope

- final Phase 8 closure doctrine
- infrastructure-era completion review
- certification-readiness governance
- unresolved blocker review
- constitutional completeness verification
- survivability completeness audit
- governance readiness scoring
- future-era handoff doctrine
- infrastructure-era archival preparation
- pre-certification continuity validation
- Phase 8 closure blockers and escalation

## Out Of Scope

- runtime authorization
- provider use
- provider adapters
- executable workflows
- deployment automation
- background jobs
- autonomous orchestration
- autonomous communication
- autonomous certification systems
- autonomous closure systems
- infrastructure activation
- infrastructure activation paths
- authorization-capable runtime logic
- credential authority
- secret authority
- deployment authority
- execution authority
- runtime activation states
- readiness authorization

## Completion Criteria

- Closure doctrine cannot authorize runtime.
- Readiness scoring cannot grant execution authority.
- Certification-readiness layers cannot enable deployment authority.
- Archival preparation cannot bypass governance supremacy.
- Continuity validation cannot enable provider execution.
- Closure safeguards cannot create autonomous orchestration authority.
- Future-era handoff cannot bypass human review.
- Readiness architecture cannot override constitutional protections.
- Closure-review architecture cannot create execution-capable infrastructure.
- Closure layers cannot bypass fail-closed doctrine.
